# BP-164 negative: the functional option only mutates the supplied instance.
lang: go
file: BP-164-safe.go
variant: option-instance-config
---
package sample

import "time"

type Config struct {
	Timeout time.Duration
}

type Option func(*Config)

// WithTimeout configures the supplied instance.
func WithTimeout(timeout time.Duration) Option {
	return func(config *Config) {
		config.Timeout = timeout
	}
}
